positive: A central, symmetrical graphic illustration of a celestial forest portal. The design features intricate, stylized silhouettes of glowing flora (luminous ferns, etheric moss) and mystical fauna (moon moths, gentle stylized deer head). The style must be high-contrast black linework combined with deep indigo and cyan luminous accents. Mimic the aesthetic of detailed woodcut engraving meets modern vector art. Composition should be perfectly balanced, ensuring a powerful central focus, negative space, and sharp edges suitable for commercial apparel printing.
